items.name: Loaf of Bread
items.description: A simple loaf of coarse bread, enough to feed one person for a meal.

items.name: Wedge of Cheese
items.description: A palm-sized wedge of hard cheese that keeps for several days.

items.name: Dried Meat (1 Day)
items.description: Salted or smoked meat rations sufficient to feed one person for a day.

items.name: Fresh Fruit (3 Pieces)
items.description: A few pieces of seasonal fruit from local orchards or farms.

items.name: Simple Tavern Meal
items.description: Plain stew, bread, and watered ale served in a common room.

items.name: Hearty Tavern Meal
items.description: A filling meal with meat, vegetables, and a full mug of ale.

items.name: Feast with Drinks
items.description: Multiple courses, quality drink, and generous portions suitable for celebrations.

items.name: Mug of Small Beer
items.description: Weak beer, safe to drink, often served to workers and children.

items.name: Mug of Ale
items.description: Standard tavern ale served in a wooden mug.

items.name: Bottle of Common Wine
items.description: A simple corked bottle of average local wine.

items.name: Bottle of Fine Wine
items.description: A well-aged bottle of imported or prestigious vineyard wine.

items.name: Rations (1 Day)
items.description: Dry trail rations of bread, cheese, nuts, and dried meat for one day.

items.name: Waterskin
items.description: A leather flask that holds enough water for a day of travel.

items.name: Backpack
items.description: A sturdy canvas or leather backpack for carrying gear.

items.name: Bedroll
items.description: A roll of blankets and padding for sleeping outdoors.

items.name: Wool Blanket
items.description: A thick wool blanket that provides warmth on cold nights.

items.name: Rope, Hempen (50 ft)
items.description: A 50-foot length of coarse hemp rope, sturdy but heavy.

items.name: Rope, Silk (50 ft)
items.description: A 50-foot length of light, strong silk rope favored by climbers.

items.name: Torch
items.description: A simple wooden torch that burns for about one hour.

items.name: Hooded Lantern
items.description: An oil lantern with a shuttered hood to control the light.

items.name: Bullseye Lantern
items.description: A lantern that focuses light into a cone for long-distance illumination.

items.name: Tinderbox
items.description: A small box with flint, steel, and tinder for starting fires.

items.name: Grappling Hook
items.description: An iron hook with multiple prongs used for climbing and securing rope.

items.name: Hammer
items.description: A small hammer suitable for driving pitons and basic repairs.

items.name: Pitons (10)
items.description: A bundle of iron spikes used for climbing or securing rope.

items.name: Crowbar
items.description: A heavy iron bar useful for prying open doors and crates.

items.name: Manacles
items.description: A set of iron restraints with a simple lock and short chain.

items.name: Ball Bearings (Bag)
items.description: A small bag with hundreds of metal bearings to scatter underfoot.

items.name: Caltrops (Bag)
items.description: A pouch of spiked metal caltrops designed to slow pursuers.

items.name: Hunting Trap
items.description: A steel trap with jagged teeth for catching animals or intruders.

items.name: Chain, Iron (10 ft)
items.description: Ten feet of sturdy iron chain with links suitable for locking or hauling.

items.name: Tent (2-Person)
items.description: A small canvas tent that comfortably shelters two people.

items.name: Wooden Bucket
items.description: A simple wooden bucket with a rope or iron handle.

items.name: Empty Barrel
items.description: A sturdy wooden barrel suitable for storing liquids or grain.

items.name: Small Sack
items.description: A small cloth sack for carrying coins, herbs, or odds and ends.

items.name: Large Sack
items.description: A burlap sack big enough to hold several days of supplies.

items.name: Wooden Chest
items.description: A lockable wooden chest used to store valuables or gear.

items.name: Simple Lock
items.description: A basic lock with a single key, offering minimal security.

items.name: Soap Bar
items.description: A small bar of lye soap with a faint herbal scent.

items.name: Candle
items.description: A simple tallow candle that burns for about an hour.

items.name: Lamp Oil (Flask)
items.description: A clay or glass flask filled with oil for fueling lanterns.

items.name: Firewood Bundle
items.description: A bundle of split logs sufficient for one evening's fire.

items.name: Ink, Vial (1 oz)
items.description: A small glass vial containing dark ink suitable for writing.

items.name: Paper, Sheet
items.description: A single sheet of pressed paper, favored by scribes.

items.name: Parchment, Sheet
items.description: A piece of treated animal skin used for more durable documents.

items.name: Writing Quill
items.description: A feather quill trimmed for writing with ink.

items.name: Sealing Wax Stick
items.description: A wax stick used to seal letters with a signet or stamp.

items.name: Needle and Thread
items.description: A small sewing set useful for mending clothes and gear.

items.name: Common Clothes (Set)
items.description: Simple peasant clothing suitable for everyday wear.

items.name: Traveler's Clothes (Set)
items.description: Durable clothing designed for long journeys on the road.

items.name: Fine Clothes (Set)
items.description: Elegant garments suitable for nobles, merchants, or formal events.

items.name: Common Cloak
items.description: A simple cloak that offers warmth and a bit of protection from rain.

items.name: Hooded Dark Cloak
items.description: A dark, hooded cloak favored by travelers and those who avoid notice.

items.name: Sturdy Boots
items.description: Heavy leather boots suitable for marching or work.

items.name: Leather Gloves
items.description: A pair of basic leather gloves that protect the hands.

items.name: Belt Pouch
items.description: A small leather pouch that hangs from a belt and holds coins or trinkets.

items.name: Copper Ring
items.description: A simple copper band worn on the finger.

items.name: Silver Ring
items.description: A plain silver ring often used as a token or modest gift.

items.name: Copper Earring
items.description: A small copper hoop or stud worn in the ear.

items.name: Hat or Hood
items.description: A simple cloth hat or hood that offers shade and warmth.

items.name: Club
items.description: A crude wooden club, little more than a shaped stick.

items.name: Dagger
items.description: A short, double-edged blade favored as a backup weapon.

items.name: Handaxe
items.description: A small axe that can be used in one hand or thrown.

items.name: Spear
items.description: A wooden shaft tipped with iron, usable for thrusting or throwing.

items.name: Quarterstaff
items.description: A length of hardwood staff commonly used by travelers and monks.

items.name: Shortsword
items.description: A light sword designed for quick strikes in close combat.

items.name: Longsword
items.description: A versatile sword commonly carried by soldiers and knights.

items.name: Greatsword
items.description: A massive two-handed blade favored by powerful warriors.

items.name: Mace
items.description: A metal club with a heavy head designed to crush armor.

items.name: Warhammer
items.description: A sturdy hammer balanced for combat, usable one-handed or two-handed.

items.name: Shortbow
items.description: A compact bow suited for hunting and skirmishing.

items.name: Longbow
items.description: A tall bow with impressive range, requiring training to use well.

items.name: Light Crossbow
items.description: A shoulder-fired crossbow that can be loaded and fired with one hand.

items.name: Heavy Crossbow
items.description: A large, powerful crossbow that fires thick iron bolts.

items.name: Sling
items.description: A simple sling of leather and cord used to hurl stones or bullets.

items.name: Arrows (20)
items.description: A bundle of twenty fletched arrows for bows.

items.name: Crossbow Bolts (20)
items.description: Twenty sturdy bolts sized for light or heavy crossbows.

items.name: Sling Bullets (20)
items.description: A pouch of twenty rounded lead or stone bullets.

items.name: Padded Armor
items.description: A quilted suit of cloth that offers minimal protection.

items.name: Leather Armor
items.description: A suit of boiled leather armor favored by scouts and rogues.

items.name: Studded Leather Armor
items.description: Leather armor reinforced with riveted metal studs.

items.name: Hide Armor
items.description: Thick animal hides stitched together for crude protection.

items.name: Chain Shirt
items.description: A shirt of interlocking metal rings worn under clothing.

items.name: Scale Mail
items.description: Overlapping metal scales sewn to backing, offering solid defense.

items.name: Breastplate
items.description: A fitted metal chestplate worn over lighter armor.

items.name: Chain Mail
items.description: A full suit of chain mail providing heavy protection.

items.name: Wooden Shield
items.description: A round or kite-shaped wooden shield with a metal boss.

items.name: Steel Shield
items.description: A reinforced metal shield offering superior protection.

items.name: Blank Book
items.description: A small bound book of blank pages for notes or records.

items.name: Local Map
items.description: A hand-drawn map of the town and its nearby surroundings.

items.name: Scroll Case
items.description: A leather or bone tube used to carry and protect scrolls.

items.name: Leather Journal
items.description: A bound journal with a leather cover and blank pages.

items.name: Wooden Holy Symbol
items.description: A carved wooden emblem of a deity, worn on a thong or chain.

items.name: Silver Holy Symbol
items.description: A polished silver symbol blessed by a local priest.

items.name: Incense Block
items.description: A small block of scented incense burned in temples or shrines.

items.name: Blessed Candle
items.description: A candle blessed during a religious ceremony, often used in rituals.

items.name: Prayer Book
items.description: A small book of hymns, prayers, and devotions.

items.name: Chicken
items.description: A live chicken kept for eggs or meat.

items.name: Goat
items.description: A milk goat or hardy grazing animal.

items.name: Sheep
items.description: A wool-bearing sheep suitable for flocks or trade.

items.name: Pig
items.description: A domesticated pig raised for meat.

items.name: Cow
items.description: A dairy or draft cow kept by farmers.

items.name: Riding Horse
items.description: A trained horse suitable for riding and travel.

items.name: Draft Horse
items.description: A strong horse bred for pulling heavy loads.

items.name: Pony
items.description: A smaller riding animal often used by children or small folk.

items.name: Mule or Donkey
items.description: A reliable beast of burden used to haul packs and carts.

items.name: Guard Dog
items.description: A trained dog that barks at intruders and defends its owner.

items.name: Animal Feed (1 Day)
items.description: Grain and fodder sufficient to feed one mount or several small animals for a day.

items.name: Riding Saddle
items.description: A leather saddle sized for a riding horse or pony.

items.name: Pack Saddle
items.description: A saddle designed for carrying packs on a beast of burden.

items.name: Saddlebags
items.description: A pair of leather bags that hang from a saddle.

items.name: Bit and Bridle
items.description: Basic tack for controlling a horse or similar mount.

items.name: Two-Wheeled Cart
items.description: A simple wooden cart pulled by a single animal.

items.name: Four-Wheeled Wagon
items.description: A large wagon suitable for hauling goods or passengers.

items.name: Inn, Common Room (Night)
items.description: A space on the floor or in a shared bunk room for one night.

items.name: Inn, Private Room (Night)
items.description: A small private room with a bed and basic furnishings for one night.

items.name: Stable Fee (Per Night)
items.description: Boarding and basic care for one mount overnight.

items.name: Common Bath
items.description: Access to a shared bathhouse pool or tub.

items.name: Scented Bath
items.description: A private or semi-private bath with scented oils and soaps.

items.name: Laundry Service
items.description: Basic washing and drying of one set of clothes.

items.name: Haircut and Shave
items.description: Grooming at a barber or bathhouse.

items.name: Messenger (In Town)
items.description: Delivery of a short message within the town walls.

items.name: Scribe Copy (1 Page)
items.description: A scribe copies or writes one page of text for you.

items.name: Hireling, Unskilled (1 Day)
items.description: Labor from a porter, cleaner, or other untrained worker for a day.

items.name: Hireling, Skilled (1 Day)
items.description: Work from a skilled artisan, guide, or specialist for a day.

items.name: Ferry Crossing (Per Person)
items.description: Passage across a river or canal on a small ferry.

items.name: Carriage Ride (In Town)
items.description: A short ride by hired carriage within the town.

items.name: Coach Passage (Per Mile)
items.description: Overland coach travel between towns charged per mile.

items.name: Thieves' Tools
items.description: A roll of picks, files, and hooks for dealing with locks and traps.

items.name: Disguise Kit
items.description: Paints, wigs, and items used to alter appearance.

items.name: Healer's Kit
items.description: Bandages, salves, and tools used to stabilize the wounded.

items.name: Herbalism Kit
items.description: Pouches, shears, and vials for gathering and preparing herbs.

items.name: Poisoner's Kit
items.description: Tools, vials, and materials for crafting and handling poisons.

items.name: Alchemist's Supplies
items.description: Glassware, burners, and tools for basic alchemical work.

items.name: Brewer's Supplies
items.description: Casks and tools needed to brew ale or beer.

items.name: Carpenter's Tools
items.description: Saws, hammers, and planes used by carpenters.

items.name: Mason's Tools
items.description: Chisels and hammers for shaping stone and brick.

items.name: Smith's Tools
items.description: Tongs, hammers, and files used at a forge.

items.name: Cobbler's Tools
items.description: Awls, knives, and forms used to make and repair shoes.

items.name: Cook's Utensils
items.description: Pots, pans, and tools needed to prepare meals.

items.name: Gaming Dice Set
items.description: A small set of carved dice used for games of chance.

items.name: Playing Cards Set
items.description: A deck of illustrated cards used in tavern games.

items.name: Pipe and Pipeweed
items.description: A smoker's pipe and a pouch of fragrant leaf.

items.name: Street Performance Tip
items.description: A typical coin given to a busker or street artist.

items.name: Small Theater Entry
items.description: Admission to a modest playhouse or performance hall.

items.name: Common Musical Instrument
items.description: A basic lute, flute, drum, or similar instrument.

items.name: Minor Healing Potion
items.description: A small vial of red liquid that closes minor wounds when drunk.

items.name: Antitoxin Vial
items.description: A bitter liquid that helps resist common poisons.

items.name: Basic Poison Vial
items.description: A clear or dark liquid applied to weapons or food.

items.name: Alchemist's Fire (Flask)
items.description: A sticky, flammable substance that ignites on impact.

items.name: Acid Vial
items.description: A glass vial of corrosive acid that damages what it touches.

items.name: Holy Water Vial
items.description: Water blessed by clergy, harmful to certain undead and fiends.

items.name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
items.description: A small scroll inscribed with a minor magical cantrip.

items.name: Spell Scroll (1st Level)
items.description: A scroll holding a simple first-tier spell for trained casters.

items.name: Chalk Piece
items.description: A small stick of chalk for marking walls, floors, or maps.

items.name: Spyglass, Cheap
items.description: A crude telescoping tube that magnifies distant objects.

items.name: Paper Festival Lantern
items.description: A decorative paper lantern lit by a small candle.

items.name: Good Lock
items.description: A more complex lock that is harder to pick or break.

items.name: Locksmith Service
items.description: Professional opening or repair of a lock when keys are lost.

items.name: Festival Token
items.description: A small wooden token used for fairground games and stalls.
